_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular profiling of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors associated with neurofibromatosis type 1, based on large-scale real-time RT-PCR.

_contextSnippet: Similar results were obtained with a second endogenous control, RPLP0 (also known as 36B4). Indeed, the 16 upregulated genes and the 12 down-regulated genes were also significantly up-regulated or down-regulated
details: Successfully quantified gene expression with similar results obtained when using RPLP0 as endogenous control, confirming reliability of measurements
